purpose_context: Today 'spec-kitty do' closes its operation record with outcome 'done' the moment it dispatches, before any work happens, so the permanent audit record in kitty-ops can claim success for work that failed or never occurred. This mission makes the record truthful: dispatch opens the record, the working agent closes it with the real outcome and evidence, hooks remind about open records, and doctor sweeps stale ones — so product owners, auditors, and other agents can trust who did what, when, and why.
purpose_tldr: Make 'spec-kitty do' record honest open→work→close Op lifecycles instead of falsely marking work done at dispatch.
